title: Engineering Journey
description: A Vanilla+ modpack based around Create, generation mods, and some quality of life
body:
![Engineering Journey](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24310819116b7f9ad011b2dbaf9668fc9b0f80c2_0.webp)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fcc6e3fb56da57b6b611d9196a4ce16f1d7569e_0.webp)
_Engineering Journey_ is a meticulously crafted **NeoForge 1.21.1** modpack designed for technical enthusiasts, blending deep automation, factory engineering, and immersive exploration. Built around **Create**, **Mekanism**, and **Applied Energistics 2**, this pack challenges players to optimize resource processing, design multiblock systems, and integrate cross-mod synergies. Enhanced by **Sodium** and **Lithium** for performance, **Iris Shaders** for visuals, and **Terralith** for dynamic worldgen, it balances complexity with polish.

![Key Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35cb630fc73067f8c596ed0bc7c66c051d9819a1_0.webp)
- **Automation & Tech:**
  - **Create:** _Ultimate Factory_, _Dragons Plus_, and _Enchantment Industry_ for mechanical creativity.
  - **Mekanism Suite** (_Generators, Tools, Additions_) + **Applied Mekanistics** for fusion with AE2’s wireless logistics.
  - **Sophisticated Storage** and **AE2 Wireless Terminals** for scalable item management.
  - **Lightman’s Currency Tech** for an in-game economy and **Mystical Agriculture** for automated resource farming.
- **Optimization:**
  - **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **Dynamic FPS** ensure 150+ FPS even in dense factories.
  - **Entity Culling** and **ImmediatelyFast** reduce GPU/CPU load.
- **Exploration & Aesthetics:**
  - **Terralith** biomes, **YUNG’s Better Dungeons/Strongholds**, and **Moog’s Voyager Structures** for adventure.
  - **Macaw’s** building sets, **FramedBlocks**, and **Complementary Shaders Reimagined** for stunning builds.
- **QoL & Extras:**
  - **Xaero’s Minimap/World Map**, **Jade**, **Controlling**, and **Crafting Tweaks** streamline gameplay.
  - **Immersive Aircraft** and **Automobility** for unique transport.
  - **FTB Quests/Chunks/Ultimine** and **BlazeandCave’s Advancements** for guided progression.

![Join our community](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ba4f637506aad4569fde70cfd1a21e208522a06_0.webp)
Join our community and start your adventure today!
![BisectHosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b88706dce8ac53dfe2f618073c19170e668d0c4d_0.webp)
